title: Bubble Drift
poem_text:
Puff puff, soft and round,
Bloop bloop, float above ground.
Swish swish, gentle breeze,
Tink tink, shake the trees.
Pop pop, tiny bright,
Glow glow, fade from sight.
Hush hush, night is near,
What sounds will you hear?
cover_context: A moonlit room where soap bubbles drift like glowing orbs, each popping silently into stardust.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, xylophone and soft claps, 94 BPM, soft and settling, warm steady rhythm, almost a lullaby, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
